title: dream_symbols
description: Catalogue of dream symbols and their possibility-framed interpretations. Sources: classical works (Ibn Sirin etc.) + admin authoring. Every entry must be scholar-reviewed before approved=true.

symbol_ar.description: The Arabic root word. Must use possibility-framed wording in meanings.

keywords_ar.description: Surface-form variants the matcher should accept.

meaning_general_ar.description: MUST use 'قد يدل' / 'من المعاني المحتملة' rather than definitive verbs.
